description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the default Newton-Raphson convergence tolerance. This API routine was first introduced in release 29.0.0. ierr = newton_tolerance(rval) ierr, rval = newton_tolerance()

parameters.name: rval
parameters.description: Value of the option setting. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, 0.1 by default; else output).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
